who: law firm office managers managing 5-10 employees
offer: For law firm office managers managing 5-10 employees, inconsistent IT asset management causes compliance risks. We automate scheduling of routine IT asset audits instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent IT asset management leading to compliance risks.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm office managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to law firm office managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try report generation and dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing asset data
